<!-- Brief description of changes -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] chore: Tooling, CI, dependencies
- [ ] test: Adding or updating tests

## Related proposal / ADR

<!-- Link to docs/proposals/ or docs/decisions/ if applicable -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions (see CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] No `any` types introduced
- [ ] No default exports (except pages/layouts)
- [ ] Bilingual fields include both EN and ES where applicable
- [ ] No coordinate data or sensitive location info exposed
